summary: Russian forces are deploying humanoid robots, reportedly American Phantom MK-1 units, in Ukraine, sparking concern over their battlefield impact. Ukrainian operators are countering with advanced tactics, including FPV drones using log-periodic antennas for increased range and jamming resistance, and dual-drone strikes to overwhelm targets. Russian infantry has been filmed engaging drones directly, with one soldier charging a Ukrainian FPV drone with a bayonet and being struck, while another was hit by two drones simultaneously while hiding behind a tree. Iranian-backed militias also launched a fiber-optic FPV drone attack on a US base near Baghdad. Russian units like "Rubikon" and "Elka" are conducting anti-drone operations, with Rubikon reporting 110 enemy personnel eliminated and Elka intercepting fixed-wing UAVs.
